hooks.command: bash -c 'BRIEF_DIR="$HOME/.herald/briefs"; if [ -d "$BRIEF_DIR" ]; then LATEST=$(ls -t "$BRIEF_DIR"/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null || stat -c %Y "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) )); if [ "$AGE" -lt 86400 ]; then echo "Fresh news digest available. Run /news-digest to read."; fi; fi; fi'
